nodes.title: Responses backend drops response metadata during provider throttling
nodes.content: When the upstream provider hits rate limits, some responses arrive without expected metadata fields. The current workaround is to preserve partial content and record the rate-limit snapshot explicitly.

nodes.title: Partial redraw leaves stale statusline after terminal resize
nodes.content: Terminal resize can leave stale status text behind when only a dirty region redraw happens. A full redraw path should be available after geometry changes.

nodes.title: Done-mention board notes are completion notifications, not fresh work requests
nodes.content: Agents should treat done-mention notes as informational completion signals. They should not restart the original task unless a new work request is created.

nodes.title: Global Knowledge must stay opt-in via explicit [GLOBAL] project selection
nodes.content: Project Memory searches default to the current project only. Cross-project reusable knowledge lives in the virtual [GLOBAL] context and must be selected explicitly.

nodes.title: Version bump work must check Cargo.lock and run post-bump validation
nodes.content: When a PRD names a target release version, implementation should bump manifests, inspect whether Cargo.lock changed, and run validation after the bump rather than stopping at pre-bump checks.

queries.text: missing response metadata from provider when throttled
completed board note should not create new task
cross project knowledge requires explicit global selection
after changing crate version also validate lockfile and rerun checks
